profile.name: Ahsan Ismail
profile.tagline: I build scalable ERP systems and custom software that businesses actually run on.

experience.detail: Lead development and customization of Odoo modules across Sales, Inventory, Accounting and HR. Build custom portals and dashboards, integrate third-party APIs, and migrate modules and databases to Odoo v18/v19.

Developed and customized Odoo modules including HRMS, Accounting and Stock. Migrated legacy modules to newer versions, built QWeb / PDF / Excel reports, and collaborated with the team lead to optimize workflows.
Participated in code reviews and contributed to team sprint goals. Gained hands-on exposure to Odoo architecture and Python best practices.

projects.title: J & J Polymer
projects.subtitle: Manufacturing ERP
projects.description: Full manufacturing ERP: procurement, cost-sheet builder, gate pass, late-payment surcharge, dual approvals across Sales, Purchase, Inventory, Manufacturing and Accounting, plus backdated entries and an expense module.

projects.title: Tijaarat Developers
projects.subtitle: Real Estate ERP
projects.description: HRMS and portal customization with Purchase, Inventory, Accounting, Requisition and Sales. Maintenance cost tracking, inventory quality checks, fund requisition, purchase comparison and global discount handling.

projects.title: BSS Development
projects.subtitle: HRMS & Finance
projects.description: Multiple Odoo 16 modules: dynamic cheque numbering, custom approval workflows, salary register reports, enhanced employee portals, payment vouchers, invoice customization and automated withholding tax.

projects.title: Hotel Reservation Module
projects.subtitle: Hospitality
projects.description: Reservation booking with check-in/out, admin approvals, dynamic pricing, guest stay histories and role-based access. Dashboards for room availability, booking trends and guest insights.

projects.title: Payment Voucher Module
projects.subtitle: Accounting
projects.description: Streamlined payment processing with automated journal entries, dynamically generated debit/credit lines linked to journals, and ir.sequence for voucher and cheque numbering.

projects.title: Employee Loan Module
projects.subtitle: HR & Accounting
projects.description: Loan application, approval and installment tracking integrated with accounting — profit JV on installment payments, configurable loan types and duplicate-application prevention.

projects.title: Diabetes Prediction System
projects.subtitle: Machine Learning
projects.description: ML system predicting diabetes risk from patient data using a logistic-regression model.

projects.title: Movement Detector
projects.subtitle: Computer Vision
projects.description: Detects head movement via webcam and sends a WhatsApp alert through the Twilio API when movement is detected.

projects.title: Tailor Measurements Saver
projects.subtitle: Flask App
projects.description: Python + Flask app to store and manage tailor measurements with full CRUD.
